result.vlm_summary:
page_state:
Booking.com Zurich search results page with filters applied; results list visible and one hotel card partially visible.
task_relevant_visible_text:
“Zurich: 5 properties found”; “Very Good: 8+”; “Breakfast included”; “Hotels”; “Free cancellation”; hotel card: “Glärnischhof by TRINITY”; “Very Good 8.3”; “Breakfast included”; “Per night $253”; “1 night, 2 adults”.
selected_candidate:
Glärnischhof by TRINITY
constraint_evidence:
- Zurich location: supported (search field and results header show Zurich)
- hotel/accommodation category: supported (“Hotels”, hotel result card)
- rating 8.5 or above: contradicted/not satisfied for visible candidate (8.3 shown); no other visible result ratings shown
- free breakfast: supported for visible candidate (“Breakfast included”)
- sauna facilities: not_visible
- stay starting Jan 20, 2026: contradicted/not satisfied in visible date field (shows Mon, Mar 2 — Tue, Mar 3)
- four nights: contradicted/not satisfied in visible date field (shows 1 night)
- price/availability: supported for visible candidate ($253 per night shown)
action_target:
Exit / send message to user “[EXIT]”
success_signals:
User-facing exit message sent; no further browsing action taken.
failure_signals:
If the intent was to continue searching, exiting now would stop progress before confirming a hotel meeting all constraints.
uncertainty:
Only one result card is clearly readable; sauna availability and any other qualifying hotels are not visible.

task_context.task: navigate: Locate a hotel in Zurich rated 8.5 or above, offering free breakfast and sauna facilities, for a stay starting from January 20, 2026, for four nights.
task_context.title: Booking.com | Official site | The best hotels, flights, car rentals & accommodations

observation.title: Booking.com | Official site | The best hotels, flights, car rentals & accommodations

args.query: Booking.com hotel search exited on results page before verifying all constraints; visible candidate had rating 8.3, breakfast included, date mismatch, sauna not visible

items.summary: The agent completed a search task but did not enforce an explicit user constraint before stopping.
items.fix_hint: Track hard constraints separately from the main goal and verify them against the final page state before returning success.

items.summary: The agent returned a plausible result that missed qualifiers in the user's request.
items.fix_hint: Extract qualifiers such as recency, thresholds, or category before evaluating candidate results.

args.expected_behavior: Continue inspecting the Booking.com results and verify a hotel in Zurich satisfies all hard constraints: rating 8.5+, free breakfast, sauna, check-in starting Jan 20, 2026, and a 4-night stay, before exiting or reporting success.
args.actual_behavior: The agent exited on the results page after one visible hotel card showed 8.3 rating, breakfast included, and mismatched dates/length of stay; sauna availability was not verified and the task constraints were not satisfied in the visible final state.
args.regression_rule: Before stopping on a travel/ecommerce results page, explicitly verify every hard constraint from the user request against the selected candidate and current date/stay fields; do not exit when any required qualifier remains unconfirmed or contradicted.

evidence.claim: The final high-detail screenshot shows Booking.com Zurich search results with filters applied and one readable hotel card.
The visible candidate is Glärnischhof by TRINITY with rating 8.3 and 'Breakfast included'.
The visible date field shows a 1-night stay on Mon, Mar 2 — Tue, Mar 3, which contradicts the requested Jan 20, 2026 start and 4-night duration.
Sauna availability is not visible in the final state, so it was not verified before exit.
The trajectory ends with a send-message '[EXIT]' action rather than further browsing or verification.
Failure memory precedent indicates this pattern is a missed-constraint issue requiring explicit verification of all user constraints before stopping.

suggested_followups.label: Find matching hotel
suggested_followups.message: Search for a Zurich hotel with rating 8.5+, free breakfast, and sauna for Jan 20, 2026, 4 nights.

suggested_followups.label: Check date settings
suggested_followups.message: Verify the check-in date and length of stay before selecting a hotel.
